title: HOZELOCK - Inlet Adaptor : For Reels and Carts, Water Connection [2166P9000], Grey, 12.5mm & 15mm
features: Hozelock quick connect fitting for 12.5mm & 15mm hose
Made from the highest quality materials for increased durability
Fits quickly and easily to your Hozelock system
Use at the tap end of the hosepipe for best results
Can be used to connect accessories to the hose
description: From the manufacturer Hose End Connector Click & Connect Technology, soft touch pads for easy grip, and durable DuPont for a reliable connection. Hose End Connector Experience seamless hose connections with Hozelock’s Hose End Connector, showcasing Click & Connect Technology . This connector clicks into place within seconds and fits most male end connectors perfectly. The Twin Soft Touch Pads offer a comfortable grip, even when wet . Attaching is simple—just click—and releasing is easy by pulling down on the pads. Made from DuPont Acetal, an ultra-tough thermoplastic, this connector combines plastic and metal for long-lasting durability. Hozelock's Hose End Connector shows strength, resistance, and a secure connection every time, with a triple contact point design for top performance year after year. Key Benefits Include: Soft Twin Touch pads provide a secure, comfortable grip for easy connection, even with wet hands. Click & Connect Technology secures attachments in seconds, streamlining your watering routine. Leak-proof design giving smooth, waste-free water delivery from tap to hose end. Durable construction with high-quality materials ensures long-lasting garden performance. Not All Connectors Are Made Equal Connection Grip: Manufactured from Dupont Acetal with a silicone additive for ease of use. Triple connect point for the strongest possible connection. Outer Sleeve: Manufactured from ABS for impact resistance and strength, with soft touch over-moulding for an enhanced grip. Tough Inner Core: Manufactured from Dupont Acetal, one of the most crystalline engineering thermoplastics, to bridge the gap between metals and plastics. Connection Grip: Polypropylene teeth stay resistant to repeated stress and provide a secure hose clamp. Hose Tail (Plus and Pro only): Manufactured from tough, but flexible Polypropylene for a secure hose connection that stops kinking.
